_metadata.confirmed: r32_templates and third_place_slot_candidates confirmed; annex_c_combinations PENDING - see _risk below
_metadata._risk: TOP CORRECTNESS RISK: annex_c_combinations encodes the official Annex C table from FIFA regulations mapping each of the 495 possible combinations of 8 qualifying third-place groups to specific R32 slot assignments. This must be verified against the official FIFA document before any simulation. The r32_templates and third_place_slot_candidates fields are confirmed; annex_c_combinations is a placeholder.

_annex_c_note: The full 495-combination table (C(12,8) = 495 ways to choose 8 qualifying groups from 12, each mapped to a specific assignment of third-place teams to slots above) is encoded in FIFA Annex C. PLACEHOLDER below — must be replaced with the official table before simulation. Phase 5 will implement this; the startup validator will check completeness.
